rules: Use approved APIs, official/public sources, and robots/API-compliant collection.
Do not scrape personal data, private communities, usernames, phone numbers, or emails.
Do not send outreach automatically; generate drafts for founder approval.
Always cite sources for factual claims.
Mark unknown permission and safety claims as unverified.

workflows.name: CampIn Airbnb Intelligence Sweep
workflows.purpose: Track Airbnb strategy, product, design, trust, host, and marketplace changes and translate them into CampIn-original actions.

workflows.name: CampIn Validation Metrics Review
workflows.purpose: Review progress against the 90-day validation targets and identify founder actions.

workflows.name: CampIn Campfire Newsletter Draft
workflows.purpose: Draft a practical issue of The Campfire from research and validation insights.

workflows.name: CampIn UX QA And Icon Review
workflows.purpose: Check app build, validation flows, strategy lab, mobile layout, and icon inventory.

workflows.name: CampIn Host Lead Enrichment
workflows.purpose: Enrich host and road-stop leads into founder-call candidates without collecting private data.

workflows.name: CampIn SEO AEO GEO Brief Factory
workflows.purpose: Create or improve one answer-first page brief for CampIn's pre-website content engine.

workflows.name: CampIn Community Pulse Review
workflows.purpose: Review WhatsApp, Instagram, newsletter, referral, and UGC signals to decide the next community action.

workflows.name: CampIn Legal And Domain Readiness Review
workflows.purpose: Check whether campin.co.in, legal pages, consent copy, analytics, grievance, and paid-pilot policies are ready.

workflows.name: CampIn Daily Outreach Drafts
workflows.purpose: Research public host, road-stop, and community candidates; score them; and draft personalized outreach for founder approval without sending messages automatically.

workflows.name: CampIn Blog Morning Publish-Ready Draft
workflows.purpose: Create one source-backed, answer-first CampIn Journal draft for a practical search query.

workflows.name: CampIn Blog Evening Publish-Ready Draft
workflows.purpose: Create one source-backed comparison, seasonal, host, community, or trend article for CampIn Journal.
